title: Task Order
description: Defines a scheduled clinical trial task for a Physical AI system, including the assigned robot, procedure type, patient reference, safety prerequisites, and scheduling metadata. Derived from the trial_schedule.json structure.

task_id.description: Unique identifier for this task order (UUID v4).

site_id.description: Clinical site where the task will be executed.

robot_id.description: Identifier of the assigned Physical AI robot.

patient_pseudonym.description: HMAC-SHA256 pseudonymized patient identifier. MUST NOT contain the real patient ID.

status.description: Current status of the task order.

scheduled_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the scheduled execution.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when execution began.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when execution completed.

safety_prerequisites.description: Safety checks that must pass before task execution.

usl_score_minimum.description: Minimum USL score required for the assigned robot to execute this task.

mcp_tools_used.description: MCP tools invoked during this task.

audit_record_ids.description: References to audit ledger records generated by this task.
